concerns.text: No verified eye-tracking dataset exists with required variables (fixation duration, saccade amplitude, gaze distribution, recall accuracy, valence label). Research.md states 'CRITICAL BLOCKER — No Verified Source Found'. The methodology cannot be executed without data.

No power analysis planned. Sample size is '[deferred]' and dependent on dataset availability. For LMM with 9 hypothesis tests (3 metrics × 3 valence), adequate power requires sufficient participants and trials. Without power analysis, cannot assess if methodology will detect effects.

Known confounds (reading skill, text difficulty, prior knowledge) not explicitly controlled for in design. LMM handles hierarchical data but does not address these confounds. Plan acknowledges 'Confounding variables... not controlled unless present in dataset (unlikely per data gap)'.
Assumptions state 'public eye-tracking datasets referenced (e.g., OpenNeuro) contain the necessary columns' but research.md confirms no verified source exists. This contradiction should be resolved.
